title: dendranthema indicum var. acutum
intro: Dendranthema indicum var. acutum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to help in relieving fever, headaches, and other ailments. The health benefits of Dendranthema indicum var. acutum include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be consumed for its medicinal properties, although its efficacy and safety need to be further studied and confirmed.
